headline: Zac Shuaib
body: 🚨💥 EXCL | Zac Shuaib to 1. FC Saarbrücken - DONE DEAL ✔️ Full agreement reached with the 19 y/o midfielder. He joins from Real Sociedad B and was developed in Arsenal’s academy. Medical completed. Contract signed. Announcement very soon. @S
text:
🚨💥 EXCL | Zac Shuaib to 1. FC Saarbrücken - DONE DEAL ✔️

Full agreement reached with the 19 y/o midfielder. He joins from Real Sociedad B and was developed in Arsenal’s academy.

Medical completed. Contract signed. Announcement very soon. 

@SkySportDE 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿🇳🇬
